tasks.title: Apply to CSAM scanning vendor (PhotoDNA/Thorn/Hive)
tasks.notes: PhotoDNA application submitted 2026-06-16

tasks.title: Write API contract doc (endpoints, request/response shapes, error codes)
Create collab-log.md for cross-AI communication
Build and deploy task dashboard to Vercel
PostgreSQL schema + migrations (users, memories, presence_pings, seals)
tasks.notes: CI gate: no migration may add coordinates to event logs

tasks.title: Auth endpoint — Apple/Google OAuth + email OTP + age gate
tasks.notes: Under-13 rejected at token exchange. DOB stored at signup.

tasks.title: SPM module scaffold (LocationEngine, APIClient, DropFeature, WanderFeature, MemoryLaneFeature, ImportFeature, DesignSystem)
tasks.notes: Empty shells with correct module boundaries. No TCA.

tasks.title: iOS auth flow — Apple/Google sign-in + email OTP UI + DOB gate screen
POST /memories — create memory record + return signed PUT URL
tasks.notes: Returns memory_id + signed_put_url. scan_status: pending on creation.

tasks.title: CSAM pipeline stub — storage webhook that flips scan_status to clear
tasks.notes: Stub returns clear immediately in dev. Swap for real vendor on approval.

tasks.title: V1 Pin drop (iOS) — camera/gallery → strip EXIF → POST /memories → background upload
tasks.notes: Validates full write path. Simplest drop method.

tasks.title: POST /discovery/scan — geohash query, asymmetric bubble math, return teasers
tasks.notes: No coordinates in response. 204 when nothing nearby. Location discarded immediately.

tasks.title: POST /memories/{id}/unlock — two-check dwell, proximity re-validate, return signed GET URLs
tasks.notes: Requires two passing proximity checks ≥20s apart. Silent rejection if accuracy > 50m.

tasks.title: Wander mode (iOS) — foreground scan calls, warmth cue gradient, pin surface on unlock
tasks.notes: Warmth cue is non-directional. No arrow, no compass. Screen-edge ambient gradient only.

tasks.title: Memory Lane (iOS) — grid of own memories, no proximity check, re-lock option
tasks.notes: No per-memory deletion. Memories persist for life of account.

tasks.title: V2 Treasure Chest (iOS) — compose flow, seals + conditions UI, recipient list
tasks.notes: Full seal suite. Private/recipients/friends privacy picker.

tasks.title: Seals + conditions evaluation (backend) — fixed_date, duration, age_based, recurring + all conditions
tasks.notes: Evaluated server-side at unlock time only. DB constraint: condition_time_fallback NOT NULL when condition set.

tasks.title: V3 Import (iOS) — PHAsset clustering, EXIF strip on-device, batch POST /memories/import
tasks.notes: Raw GPS never leaves device. ~50 clusters presented. Private-only, elevation forbidden.

tasks.title: POST /memories/import — batch memory creation from cluster list
tasks.notes: Idempotency key: geohash + capture-date bucket. source: imported, private-only enforced.

tasks.title: V4 Note in a Bottle (iOS) — text-only drop, time-only seals
Background proximity (iOS) — significant-change, CLMonitor region rotation, CLVisit, APNs push
tasks.notes: ~14 own pins + ~5 coarse geohash zones. Zero location hardware at steady state.

tasks.title: App Attest + simulated-location rejection + accuracy sanity checks
tasks.notes: Feature-flagged gate (app_attest_required). Bypass is audit-logged. iOS checks isSimulatedBySoftware.

tasks.title: Rate limits, audit log, account export + cascade delete
tasks.notes: GET /user/export returns signed archive. No coordinates in event log ever.

tasks.title: CSAM vendor live — swap stub for real hash-match webhook
tasks.notes: Blocked on vendor approval. Mandatory reporting per 18 U.S.C. §2258A on match.

tasks.title: TestFlight beta — App Store labels, reviewer rationale for background location
tasks.notes: Write App Store reviewer rationale for background-location permission early.

tasks.title: Phone verification + recipient ACL + summons flow (SMS deep link)
tasks.notes: Twilio SMS for summons. E.164 phone numbers. Deep link → sign-in → memory surfaced.

tasks.title: Friends graph + friends-tier discovery
tasks.notes: Mutual connections. Accept = friend-tier memories discoverable in proximity.

tasks.title: Replies — place-locked Memory record attached to original pin
tasks.notes: Discoverer submits reply at same location. Owner discovers on next return.

tasks.title: Vault — shared family memory map, $99/yr tier, milestone seals
tasks.notes: Child access at 13. StoreKit 2 subscription.

tasks.title: Public memories (16+) — content screening pipeline, moderation queue
tasks.notes: Must revisit velocity/teleport detection before Phase 3 (DEC-23).

tasks.title: Institutional layer — university/festival/tourism board curated license
tasks.notes: Annual per-geography license. No ads inside experience ever.

tasks.title: Android
